title: Mark Courtney
compiled_truth: Mark Courtney is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-17 to 2001-12-03), Mark Courtney sent 10 and received 302 emails, totalling 312 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (10), [John Walt](people/john-walt) (4), [Brian O'Rourke](people/brian-o-rourke) (4), [Mark Knippa](people/mark-knippa) (4), [Petual Jeanmard](people/petual-jeanmard) (4).
